title: Copy and paste in emails... not working!
excerpt: Hi there - I need to be able to copy text from old emails into Monday.com email integration. It literally won’t let me paste anything into an email and I am having to type manually. Why is the paste feature not working!!…

posts.author: SarahX (Sarah Nichols)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - I need to be able to copy text from old emails into Monday.com email integration. It literally won’t let me paste anything into an email and I am having to type manually. Why is the paste feature not working!!!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SarahX

Welcome to the Community!

Sorry to hear you’re having issues here! We’d love to take a closer look to see what you’re experiencing.
Are you able to reach out to our team at support@monday.com?
We will likely need to grab a few more details from you in order to completely understand the situation so it would be better to do this within a private email thread with our support team

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again @SarahX!

Just wanted to check in here to see if you were able to get this resolved?
If not, we’d be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani
